candidates.why: Direct top-line revenue line near the top of the income statement with populated values across years.
Also a top-line revenue total and matches the same values as the main revenue line; useful as fallback if label changes by year.

variables.notes: Using revenue lines as a priority list, not a sum.

candidates.why: Best direct cost-of-sales style line; sits under operating expenses and matches cost of revenues concept.
Also a valid COGS total, but appears duplicative of Cost of Operating Revenue.

candidates.row_label: Cost of Revenue including Operation & Maintenance (Utility) - Total
candidates.why: Another cost-of-revenue total, but likely duplicative/supplemental.
Excludes depreciation and therefore may omit part of reported cost of revenue relative to headline COGS.

variables.notes: Selected the primary direct cost line and avoided duplicate cost-of-revenue totals/components.

candidates.row_label: Selling, General & Administrative Expenses excluding Research & Development Expenses
candidates.why: Explicit SG&A row and semantically the best overhead measure; already excludes R&D, which fits the PROF construction when XRD is left empty.

candidates.row_label: Labor & Related Expenses including Stock-Based Compensation in Selling, General & Administrative Expenses
candidates.why: Valid SG&A component, but should not be used when a broader explicit SG&A row exists.
Too broad and includes COGS/other items; only a fallback if no explicit SG&A exists.

final_choice.row_label: Selling, General & Administrative Expenses excluding Research & Development Expenses

variables.notes: Explicit SG&A row exists and should be selected alone. Chose the semantically strongest SG&A line that already excludes R&D, so XRD is set to empty to avoid subtracting R&D twice.

candidates.why: Dedicated R&D expense line, but it should not be selected when chosen SG&A already explicitly excludes R&D for PROF purposes.
Capitalized portion is not the operating expense line to use alone for XRD.

candidates.row_label: Amortization of Capitalized Research & Development Expenses - Supplemental
candidates.why: Amortization is not the dedicated R&D expense target.

variables.notes: Chosen SG&A row is 'Selling, General & Administrative Expenses excluding Research & Development Expenses', which clearly excludes R&D. Per instructions, XRD should be empty in this case to avoid understating SG&A through an extra subtraction.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense - Net of Capitalized Interest
candidates.why: Best recurring interest expense line; preferred over broader finance-cost totals and appears populated across years.
Also a direct interest expense line, but values duplicate the net-of-capitalized-interest row.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supple
candidates.why: Recurring finance cost component, but likely already included in total interest expense; adding risks double counting.

final_choice.row_label: Interest Expense - Net of Capitalized Interest

variables.notes: Used the most granular primary recurring interest-expense line and avoided duplicate totals/components.

candidates.row_label: Shareholders' Equity - Attributable to Parent Shareholders - Total
candidates.why: Best book equity line because it excludes minority interest and is explicitly attributable to parent shareholders.

candidates.row_label: Common Equity Attributable to Parent Shareholders
candidates.why: Equivalent owner-attributable equity line; useful fallback if labels vary by year.
Also appears to equal parent common equity and excludes NCI here; acceptable fallback.

final_choice.row_label: Shareholders' Equity - Attributable to Parent Shareholders - Total
Common Equity Attributable to Parent Shareholders

variables.notes: Using owner-attributable equity lines as a priority list to avoid double counting minority interest.

candidates.why: Direct non-controlling interest / minority interest equity line on the balance sheet.
Income statement allocation line, not preferred versus balance-sheet minority equity.

variables.notes: Selected the direct balance-sheet minority interest line.
